creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alan Somers from comment #2)

Hi Alan,

I fixed the problem you've reported (thanks!) with a local patch for the time being, as I'm not sure how far your testing of iocage-devel went (like, upgrading existing/more complex setups, or if it was just limited to seeing if this specific problem persists).

I'm a bit unclear what's the best way forward with sysutils/iocage, given that there is no publicly perceivable release process and we already have iocage-devel, which is based on "random" commits. Until I have a sound solution, I'll try to keep 1.2 stable (as in: users shouldn't be afraid that `pkg upgrade` will damage their setup).
